(Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC re-set to 7/12/2007 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)

Notice Of Motion For Order Imposing Sanctions For Disobedience Of Discovery Order
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Caral N. Depetris Trustee of the Carla Nicole Depetris' Motion For Order Imposing Sanctions For Disobedience Of Discovery Order is granted as it seeks evidentiary sanctions. By this order, Defendant is hereby precluded from offering evidence supporting a finding that Plaintiff and Defendant were "joint venturers;" supporting a finding that Defendant made any repayments to Plaintiff; supporting a finding that Defendant secured his obligations to Plaintiff; supporting a finding that Defendant disclosed to Plaintiff risks of investing with Defendant; supporting any defense of consent or waiver by Plaintiff; supporting any affirmative defense asserted in Defendant's answer; supporting any material denial raised in Defendant's answer; supporting the existence of any contract between Defendant and Plaintiff or of any breach of contract by Plaintiff. Defendant's failure to comply with the prior court order was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $630, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Set For Trial On Aug-06-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-18-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 611

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Written Discovery, For Order Deeming Genuiness Of Documents Admitted, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Carla Depetris' Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Written Discovery, For Order Deeming Genuineness Of Documents Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to the form interrogatories and request for production of documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The Requests For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $408.75, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
